'''âl-g-b''' ('''lagaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unacquaint|unacquaint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unacquaint|unacquaint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-g-b
|-
! Lemma
| lagaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagabithi|lagabithi]] || [[word:lagabiji|lagabiji]] || [[word:lagabishi|lagabishi]] || [[word:lagabi|lagabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagabuthuth|lagabuthuth]] || [[word:lagabujuj|lagabujuj]] || [[word:lagabushush|lagabushush]] || [[word:lagab|lagab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagabuthu|lagabuthu]] || [[word:lagabuju|lagabuju]] || [[word:lagabushu|lagabushu]] || [[word:lagabu|lagabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagabufuth|lagabufuth]] || [[word:lagabufuj|lagabufuj]] || [[word:lagabufush|lagabufush]] || [[word:lagabuf|lagabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagabethe|lagabethe]] || [[word:lagabeje|lagabeje]] || [[word:lagabeshe|lagabeshe]] || [[word:lagabe|lagabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagabothoth|lagabothoth]] || [[word:lagabojoj|lagabojoj]] || [[word:lagaboshosh|lagaboshosh]] || [[word:lagab|lagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagabotho|lagabotho]] || [[word:lagabojo|lagabojo]] || [[word:lagabosho|lagabosho]] || [[word:lagabo|lagabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagabofoth|lagabofoth]] || [[word:lagabofoj|lagabofoj]] || [[word:lagabofosh|lagabofosh]] || [[word:lagabof|lagabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagabĂŠthĂŠ|lagabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lagabĂŠjĂŠ|lagabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lagabĂŠshĂŠ|lagabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lagabĂŠ|lagabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagabathath|lagabathath]] || [[word:lagabajaj|lagabajaj]] || [[word:lagabashash|lagabashash]] || [[word:lagab|lagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagabatha|lagabatha]] || [[word:lagabaja|lagabaja]] || [[word:lagabasha|lagabasha]] || [[word:lagaba|lagaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagabafath|lagabafath]] || [[word:lagabafaj|lagabafaj]] || [[word:lagabafash|lagabafash]] || [[word:lagabaf|lagabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lagabasha|lagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golagabasha|golagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilagabasha|gokilagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lagabnĂŒsha|lagabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golagabnknĂŒsha|golagabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilagabnĂŒsha|gokilagabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lagabshĂ«sha|lagabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golagabnkshĂ«sha|golagabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilagabshĂ«sha|gokilagabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagabrosha|lagabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagabnkrosha|golagabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagabrosha|gokilagabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lagabmusha|lagabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golagabnkmusha|golagabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagabmusha|gokilagabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lagabsherasha|lagabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golagabnksherasha|golagabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilagabsherasha|gokilagabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lagabngasha|lagabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golagabnkngasha|golagabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilagabngasha|gokilagabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lagabyasha|lagabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golagabnkyasha|golagabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilagabyasha|gokilagabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lagabyamasha|lagabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golagabnkyamasha|golagabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilagabyamasha|gokilagabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagabnĂŒshĂ«sha|lagabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golagabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilagabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagabnĂŒrosha|lagabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagabnknĂŒrosha|golagabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagabnĂŒrosha|gokilagabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagabnĂŒmusha|lagabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagabnknĂŒmusha|golagabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagabnĂŒmusha|gokilagabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagabshĂ«nĂŒsha|lagabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golagabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilagabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagabshĂ«rosha|lagabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagabnkshĂ«rosha|golagabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagabshĂ«rosha|gokilagabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagabshĂ«musha|lagabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagabnkshĂ«musha|golagabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagabshĂ«musha|gokilagabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagabronĂŒsha|lagabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagabnkronĂŒsha|golagabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagabronĂŒsha|gokilagabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagabroshĂ«sha|lagabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagabnkroshĂ«sha|golagabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagabroshĂ«sha|gokilagabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagabromusha|lagabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagabnkromusha|golagabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagabromusha|gokilagabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagabmunĂŒsha|lagabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagabnkmunĂŒsha|golagabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagabmunĂŒsha|gokilagabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagabmushĂ«sha|lagabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagabnkmushĂ«sha|golagabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagabmushĂ«sha|gokilagabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagabmurosha|lagabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagabnkmurosha|golagabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagabmurosha|gokilagabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lagab|lagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠb|lĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holagab|holagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠgĂŠb|holĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholagab|hoholagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠgĂŠb|hoholĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlagab|nĂŒlagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŒlĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlagab|nĂŒnĂŒlagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlagab|nĂŻlagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŻlĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlagab|nĂŻnĂŻlagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulagab|lulagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠgĂŠb|lulĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululagab|lululagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠgĂŠb|lululĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilagab|lilagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠgĂŠb|lilĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililagab|lililagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠgĂŠb|lililĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolagab|kolagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠgĂŠb|kolĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolagab|kokolagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠgĂŠb|kokolĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelagab|kelagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠgĂŠb|kelĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelagab|kekelagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠgĂŠb|kekelĂŠgĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
